title: MatchingRequestEvent
description: SQS event payload sent by the Creation Service to request reviewer matching for a submission.

submissionId.description: Unique identifier of the submission to be matched with reviewers.

submitterIds.description: Cognito subs (UUIDs) of the users who submitted the paper. Used to exclude self-review.

numberOfExaminers.description: Number of reviewers to assign to this submission.

topicTag.description: The topic tag associated with the submission for reviewer matching.

customReviewerIds.description: List of specific reviewer IDs to assign, bypassing the automatic matching process.
